description: Engagement document (shidukkhin) and dowry list: "The clothes and the nedunya and the contante [Italian for cash] of the widow Ms. Dona bt. Moshe Ptso/Ftso"). The surname may be a Romance-language term that is missing one or two vowels. Dated 1 July 1794 CE (3 Tammuz 5554 AM). The document is in Hebrew but several of the items on the dowry list seem to be in Judaeo-Arabic. Dona will marry Shelomo Zaytūn b. Yaʿaqov Zaytūn on שבת נחמו (the first Shabbat after Tisha B'Av), which was Saturday 13 Av 5554 AM (9 August 1794 CE). ASE. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בHebrew, Italian, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
